code:
import io
import string
import list

fn get_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0 - 1
  end
end

fn get_int(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = get_byte(line, i)
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not has
        has = true
        cur = 0
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not has
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        if neg
          nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
        else
          nums = list.push(nums, cur)
        end
      end
      has = false
      neg = false
      cur = 0
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
    else
      nums = list.push(nums, cur)
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn emit_reversed(_ nums: List<Int>) -> Unit
  mut out = ""
  mut j = list.len(nums) - 1
  mut first = true
  while j >= 0
    let v = get_int(nums, j)
    if first
      out = "#{v}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    emit_reversed(parse_line(line))
  when None
    ()
  end
end
